description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure depicted in a dynamic pose, as if about to throw or swing a cylindrical object held in his right hand. He has a muscular build, with defined arms and a broad chest, and is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve shirt, belted jeans, and athletic sneakers. The figure's hair is styled in a voluminous, slicked-back manner, and his facial features are strong and expressive. The clothing is casual and urban, with visible seams and details such as a studded belt and textured shoes. The object in his hand resembles a flashlight or baton, gripped firmly as part of his action stance. The overall appearance suggests a confident, active individual, possibly engaged in a street or urban scenario.
description: A muscular adult male in casual urban attire, posed dynamically with a cylindrical object in hand, ready for action. He wears a fitted shirt, jeans, sneakers, and has slicked-back hair.
description_view_0: Front-side view showing the figure's facial features, muscular build, and the cylindrical object held near his face.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the shirt, jeans, and the figure's stance with one arm extended backward.
description_view_2: Side-back view focusing on the figure's posture, the grip on the cylindrical object, and the details of the shoes and belt.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the figure's chest, facial expression, and the forward motion of the arm holding the object.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt, belted jeans, athletic sneakers
attribute_posture: dynamic action stance, one arm raised as if about to throw or swing
